channel.title: Blogs on 8Bit Dev & More
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on 8Bit Dev & More

item.title: My First Hugo Post
item.description: Welcome to my first Hugo post. I am testing out some new stuff and hoping to code my blog from scratch so I can have more freedom. One thing I would like to say is that there will be ADs enabled through Google Sense. Now I like to use ad blockers so I will not tell you to use it or not. I only enabled this to generate earnings and I know it won’t be much but at least it’s something.
